_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Assess and design security management functions as related to cyberspace.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting security assessments of data platforms and AI systems, including vulnerability identification, penetration testing coordination, and security architecture review.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.453), SP-A-003 (SP, cosine: 0.436).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.509). Shared vocabulary: [security]. DCWF-only terms [assess, cyberspace, design, functions, management, related] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, architecture, assessments, conducting, coordination, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.882, R=0.872). Balanced P/R — the 10-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Assess and design security management functions as related to cyberspace." and "Skill in conducting security assessments of data platforms and AI systems, inclu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.481 ≈ STS 0.509 (gap 0.028). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [security] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.4%. Shared tokens: [security]. DCWF-only: [assess, cyberspace, design, functions, management, related]. WIDAI-only: [ai, architecture, assessments, conducting, coordination, data].
